headline: Netflix Shifts From Warner Deal To Content Spend And Buybacks Focus
summary: Netflix has stepped away from the bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery after months of talks. The company is choosing to focus on independence and internal content production instead of a large acquisition. Netflix plans to invest $20b in its own films and series while exploring new broadcaster partnerships. For investors watching NasdaqGS:NFLX, this decision comes with the stock recently trading at $97.09. The shares show a 27.7% return over the past week and 16.3% over the past month,...
